summary.lv: Manpower klients DNB Latvijas filiāle meklē iepirkumu speciālistu ar 2+ gadu pieredzi un izpratni par līgumiem, KPI un iepirkumu procesiem.
summary.en: A Manpower client, DNB's Latvia branch, is hiring a Procurement Specialist with 2+ years of experience and a working understanding of contracts, KPIs and procurement processes.
